titleStmt.title: SII 37.224: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 224. (A.R. No. B 328 of 1940-41.) Dēvaguḍi, Jammalamaḍugu Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Pillar in the mukha-maṇḍapa of the Talakaṇṭamma shrine.
This is dated Śaka 1220, Vilambi, Kārtīka ba. 7, Monday corresponding to 1298 A.D., October 27.

It records the release deed relating to the share of Nala Bairajīya, the priest of the Talakaṇṭidēvi temple, formerly sold by him on account of the hardship experienced during a famine in the years Jaya and Manmatha.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
� svasti . śrī śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1220 guneṁ
ṭṭi viḷaṁbi saṁvatsara kārttika bahaḷa 7 sō . taḷa
kaṁṭidēvipūjā [nalabaIra] jiyalu ja
ya manumadha saṁvatsara kaṟavu naṁ
du jaragakapōI tōḍipāḍlavāri saṁmati
lēka nūṁkajiyyala māregārikini tana
pālilōnu sagamu vrittinni varusa dinamu
lu Ā bhūmi gūḍanu krayamugānu
Aṁmi koṁnavi varahana rūkalu mā
ḍalu 44 . ṭikini vārikini Ika tōḍipāḍla
vāru pōlajiyala taḷayānu siddajiya
la taḷayānu prōle
nū barenu Inalu
vuruṁ gūḍanu vāri

kini Ika Inumaḍi veṭi vritti viḍipiṁcina
vi re 90 toṁbayi rūkalunu vrayamu da
galinavi re 12 rūkalūnu Ubhayamunu
re 102 nūṁṭareṁḍu rūkala saṁnālu rū
kala māḍlu ga 250 . Iruvaḍēnu māḍlūnu
Aravēṭi viḍipiṁciri miṁdanu I Aravāla
vrittikini taḷajiyalakuṁ cenaṁgarādu dīni
ki sākṣulu kuṟumaṟi tabasi venayamānu
jinadēvara pūjāri subhakīrttini doṁḍapāṭi
tikajiyalūnu nilajīyalūnu daṁḍipā
ṭi dēvajiyala cavuḍūri nāgajiyala ro
yaka bayanānu rāmajīyala dīvenū
naṁdyāla nīlayānu pallalapāṭi braṁmajī
yalānu kaniyaṁpāṭi baIjīyalū
malajīyālu virimaḍuka braṁmēśa
ruṁḍūnu Avubhaḷuni vrālu paṁcārū
ḍi patraṁ .
Digital edition of SII 37.224 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
